pr.title: Record: 1.1558 BPB — 11L U-Net + Catalytic + SwiGLU + SW64

output.summary: 11-layer U-Net transformer mixes gated encoder–decoder skips, Catalytic residuals, and SwiGLU MLPs with sliding-window eval for richer context.
techniques: 11-layer U-Net skips with SwiGLU and Catalytic residual gating
Value residual blending plus LN dampening and decoder LR multiplier tuning
Int5/6 mixed quantization with sliding-window evaluation
